forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain likely and a chance of thunderstorms and patchy fog. Cloudy, with a high near 63. South wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 33 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Rain and a slight chance of thunderstorms before 8pm, then rain and patchy fog. Cloudy. Low around 40, with temperatures rising to around 54 overnight. South wind 15 to 22 mph, with gusts as high as 64 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

weather_report:
In Boston today, the atmosphere is thick with an enveloping mist, as rain begins to tease the landscape, accompanied by the distant rumble of thunder. The sky, a muted canvas of gray, casts a somber, yet strangely soothing light over the city. The temperature lingers around a cool 63 degrees, while gusts of wind whip through, carrying the fresh scent of impending rain. As the day progresses, the chance of precipitation swells to near certainty, promising a drenching that may last into the night. Tonight, as the temperature hovers near 40 degrees and then slowly rises to 54, patrons will find the world outside shrouded in a cocoon of fog, casting the familiar landmarks into an abstract dream.

In light of the weather, dressing in layers becomes essential. A warm but breathable coat, paired with sturdy footwear to navigate puddled streets, will both shield against the chill and keep you comfortable. The weather may deter outdoor activities, but for those who dare, perhaps a brisk walk under an umbrella to experience the enchanting ambiance of raindrops and mist is in order. Alternatively, curling up with a good book and a warm beverage might serve as the perfect escape, as the rhythms of the rain create a symphony against your window. Embrace this moment; the weather invites both reflection and cozy reprieve.
